reason: Verify session rail / status pill / group header / preview panel follow component conventions
Verify layout uses design tokens, no ad-hoc styling regressions
Verify IPC for fs read + resume/rename/delete is correctly wired and scoped
Verify renderer type safety for new session/preview shapes
Verify logging on resume relaunch, persistence, and fs read failures
Verify main-process handler + session store type safety
Verify maintainability and scoped, rollback-safe changes
Verify cross-layer data flow pty-manager -> main -> preload -> renderer, no missed update sites
Verify resume/delete semantics (live vs closed sessions) handled consistently
Verify preview + grouping implementation matches chosen patterns
